heading: Today
text: Some morning clouds, then partly sunny, hot, and humid.

heading: Tonight
text: Numerous showers and very strong thunderstorms north, partly cloudy south.

heading: Wednesday
text: A stray morning shower. Becoming sunny and less humid.

heading: Thursday
text: Partly sunny. Scattered afternoon showers and storms north.
temperature: Mid 70s to mid 80s north to south
